requirement: Participant count is between 2 and 19 when tournament is active or finished
Total rounds is at least 1 when tournament is active or finished
Current round count never exceeds total rounds
Participants have non-negative scores at all times
Opponent tracking is symmetric across all participants (FIDE Rule 2 foundation)
Accepted round pairings contain no rematches between participants (FIDE Rule 2)
Each participant appears at most once in accepted round pairings (FIDE Rule 3)
A bye is present when and only when the participant count is odd (FIDE Rule 3)
Accepted bye recipient has not previously received a pairing-allocated bye (FIDE Rule 4)
Active round always has structurally valid pairings and valid participant indices
Color history length equals total games played as white plus black for every participant
When colors are assigned via ChooseColors, the color difference for each participant in the pairing stays within minus 2 to 2 (FIDE Rule 6)
When a valid non-repeating color is appended to a participant's color history, the no-three-consecutive-same-color property is preserved (FIDE Rule 7)
All accepted pairings cover every participant exactly once (bye or paired)
